narration: Here's what science actually says about selection bias.
visual_description: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about selection bias.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about selection bias.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about selection bias.

narration: Selection bias occurs when the sample in a study isn't representative of the whole population.
visual_description: Context visual: Selection bias occurs when the sample in a study isn't representative of the whole population.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Selection bias occurs when the sample in a study isn't representative of the whole population.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Selection bias occurs when the sample in a study isn't representative of the whole population.

narration: This can lead to misleading conclusions, especially in health research.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This can lead to misleading conclusions, especially in health research.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This can lead to misleading conclusions, especially in health research.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This can lead to misleading conclusions, especially in health research.

narration: For example, if a study only gathers data from one demographic, it overlooks critical insight.
visual_description: Evidence visual: For example, if a study only gathers data from one demographic, it overlooks critical insight.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: For example, if a study only gathers data from one demographic, it overlooks critical insight.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: For example, if a study only gathers data from one demographic, it overlooks critical insight.

narration: Recognizing this bias helps us interpret research more accurately.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias helps us interpret research more accurately.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias helps us interpret research more accurately.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias helps us interpret research more accurately.
